title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data to enable robots to understand and predict their environment. It is part of NVIDIA's physical AI stack alongside Vera, an agent CPU layer, and the Isaac GR00T humanoid robot reference platform.
